sources.document: JPDP Guideline on Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA)
sources.instrument_id: JPDP Guideline (BM-only), issued by Commissioner Shariffah Rashidah Syed Othman
sources.edition: Issued 30 April 2026 (supersedes PCP No. 1/2025 consultation draft)

sources.document: JPDP Guideline on Data Protection by Design (DPbD)
JPDP Guideline on Automated Decision-Making and Profiling (ADMP)
PCP No. 1/2025, No. 2/2025, No. 3/2025 (DPIA/DPbD/ADMP consultation papers)
sources.edition: consultation draft (superseded by issued guidelines above)

notes: LEARNINGS.md documents a formal QA audit: 12 findings, most critical a fabricated amendment instrument number (A1699 for the real A1727) that had propagated across 35+ files — since corrected, and CLAUDE.md/amendment-tracker.json now consistently show A1727. Other fixed issues: collapsed three-phase A1727 commencement dates, 23 missing bidirectional provision-map entries, hardcoded stale stats in app.js, malformed cross-reference IDs (5 of 7 critical findings fixed correctly per LEARNINGS.md summary, with 2 regressions introduced during fixing — worth spot-checking those regressions if this repo is relied on for client work). The JPDP DPIA/DPbD/ADMP guidelines are BM-only as issued; repo content is an English paraphrase/alignment, explicitly tagged "official-aligned"/"official-paraphrase"
